overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxurious modern apartment in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), starting in a bedroom with panoramic windows, moving through a dark interior corridor with indoor plants, and emerging into a bright upper living area with glass railings, a pool table, and views of a futuristic city skyline.

agents.ego_description: walking through a modern bedroom, passing by the bed and moving toward the interior of the apartment

entered.detail: modern bed with blue and white striped comforter and pillows
tall rectangular illuminated floor lamp with warm light
panoramic window showing mountain landscape with blue sky
dark wooden shelving unit with glass doors

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit modern bedroom with a large bed in the center. Warm morning light streams through panoramic windows revealing a mountain view. The camera moves steadily forward past a glowing floor lamp, heading toward the interior of the apartment.

events.description: moves from bright sunlit bedroom into dimly lit interior corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through a dark corridor with indoor plants, heading toward a bright opening ahead

entered.detail: tall tropical palm tree in an interior planter bed
doorway leading to brightly lit upper level area

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions into a dimly lit interior corridor where natural light fades to artificial low lighting. A large indoor palm tree stands in the center of the walkway as the camera moves toward a bright doorway at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level living area with glass railings and panoramic city views

events.description: emerges from dark corridor into bright sunlit upper level with panoramic city views
pool table comes into view as camera moves along the upper walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along an upper level walkway with glass railings, overlooking a futuristic cityscape with palm trees

entered.detail: transparent glass balcony railing with gold metal trim overlooking lower level
tall vertical abstract painting with teal, purple and gold tones
futuristic cityscape with skyscrapers and high-rise buildings visible through panoramic windows
red felt pool table with white frame and balls arranged for play
rectangular black planter with lush green tropical plants

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the dark corridor into a spectacular bright upper living area with floor-to-ceiling windows revealing a futuristic city skyline. The space features modern glass railings, abstract artwork on the walls, and a pool table. Lush indoor plants and warm sunlight create a luxurious atmosphere as the camera moves along the walkway overlooking the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit private bedroom through a shadowed interior corridor and into a sprawling, bright upper living area. It begins in a modern bedroom where warm morning light streams through panoramic windows overlooking a mountain range, moving steadily past a glowing floor lamp. As the camera enters the interior of the apartment, the natural light fades into a dimly lit corridor centered around a large indoor palm tree. The scene then opens abruptly as the camera emerges from the darkness into a spectacular living space defined by floor-to-ceiling windows and a futuristic city skyline. Finally, the view expands across glass railings, abstract artwork, and a pool table, moving along a luxurious walkway bathed in warm sunlight.
